message:
fix(doctor): remove redundant WAL/SHM file removal loop

The repair code had two loops removing -wal/-shm files: one using
with_extension() and another using string concatenation. Both
produced identical paths for standard .sqlite3 files. Consolidated
into a single string-concatenation loop that handles both extensioned
and bare database paths correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
